name: artificial-planeswalker
description: MTG deckbuilding assistant: card lookup, deck management & validation, mana-curve & synergy analysis, and local semantic card search — over a local Scryfall database.
long_description: A stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives an LLM expert Magic: The Gathering deckbuilding tools — keyword and semantic card search, deck management, and format-legality, mana-curve, and synergy analysis — over a local Scryfall card database. Runs entirely on your machine via uv; makes no LLM calls of its own.

tools.name: lookup_card_by_name
tools.description: Look up a Magic card by exact or partial name.

tools.name: search_cards
tools.description: Search cards by color, type, rarity, mana value, text, and other filters.

tools.name: semantic_search_cards
tools.description: Find cards by natural-language meaning using local semantic search.

tools.name: find_similar_cards
tools.description: Find cards similar to a given card.

tools.name: list_decks
tools.description: List saved decks, optionally filtered by format.

tools.name: load_deck
tools.description: Load a saved deck with its full card list.

tools.name: add_card_to_deck
tools.description: Add a card to a deck's mainboard or sideboard.

tools.name: remove_card_from_deck
tools.description: Remove a card from a deck.

tools.name: analyze_mana_curve
tools.description: Analyze a deck's mana curve and land count.

tools.name: detect_synergies
tools.description: Detect card synergies within a deck.

tools.name: validate_deck
tools.description: Validate a deck against a format's construction rules.

tools.name: report_bug
tools.description: File a bug report about the assistant.
